query: What is the current state of the 2026 Tour de France as of mid-July 2026? What are the start and end dates, current stage, and general classification (GC) standings? How is Tadej Pogačar performing and how many stages has he won so far?
answer:
I've completed my research on the 2026 Tour de France. Here's the summary:

**Race Status (as of mid-July 2026 / Stage 9):**
- **Dates:** July 4–26, 2026 (Grand Départ in Barcelona; finishes in Paris)
- **Progress:** 9 of 21 stages complete; Stage 9 raced July 12, now at the first rest day

**GC Standings (top 5):**
1. Tadej Pogačar (UAE) — leader, 32:17:04
2. Jonas Vingegaard (Visma) +2:42
3. Isaac del Toro (UAE) +3:27
4. Remco Evenepoel (Red Bull‑BORA) +3:30
5. Juan Ayuso (Lidl‑Trek) +3:34

**Pogačar's performance:** Dominant. He leads by 2:42 and holds two jerseys (yellow GC + polka-dot mountains), with teammate del Toro third overall.

**Pogačar's stage wins: 2** — Stage 3 (mountain finish at Les Angles, his 22nd career Tour stage win) and Stage 6 (Pyrenean stage over the Tourmalet). Stage 9 was won by Mathieu van der Poel.

All findings, sources, and quantitative data points have been recorded in the structured output.

sources.title: Tour de France 2026 Classifications Update Stage 9 - Mads Pedersen extends green jersey lead as Tadej Pogacar remains untouched in yellow
sources.snippet: GC top 10 after Stage 9 with Pogačar leading at 32:17:04, Vingegaard +2:42, del Toro +3:27; jersey holders listed.

sources.title: Tour de France 2026: Results
sources.snippet: Race runs July 4-26, 2026. Stage-by-stage winners: Stage 3 Pogacar (Les Angles), Stage 6 Pogacar (Tourmalet), Stage 9 van der Poel.

sources.title: Tadej Pogacar wins Stage 3 and takes the Tour de France yellow jersey
sources.snippet: Pogacar posted his 22nd career Tour stage win at Les Angles and seized the yellow jersey on Monday.

sources.title: 'Nothing to lose' – Tadej Pogačar destroys field in Pyrenees on stage 6 of Tour de France to take win and yellow jersey
sources.snippet: Pogacar wins Stage 6 over Col d'Aspin and Col du Tourmalet and reclaims the yellow jersey.

sources.title: Van der Poel powers to victory on 9th stage of Tour de France and Pogacar keeps yellow jersey
sources.snippet: Mathieu van der Poel won the hilly ninth stage in a sprint at Ussel; Pogacar kept the yellow jersey on Sunday.

sources.title: Tour de France 2026 GC standings – Tadej Pogačar remains in yellow after sprint stage
Tour de France 2026 Stage 3: Pogačar Rules the Roost
sources.snippet: Monday, 6 July 2026 — Stage 3: Granollers > Les Angles (195.9km); Pogacar wins, takes yellow on countback tied with Vingegaard.

sources.title: 2026 Tour de France Standings
sources.snippet: The 2026 Tour de France runs through Sunday, July 26, with 21 stages.
